notes: Extended cases for counting nodes with exactly one child.

cases.name: sample_count_one_child_nodes
expect_contains_all: The number of nodes that have exactly one child node is: 2.

cases.name: single_node_has_no_one_child_nodes
expect_contains_all: The number of nodes that have exactly one child node is: 0.

cases.name: left_skewed_tree_has_two_one_child_nodes
expect_contains_all: The number of nodes that have exactly one child node is: 2.
